reference: I am trying to find a doctor or medical doctor that works in neurology. I was in a car accident thirty-five years ago and have recently started having seizures from the head injury. I want to find someone who will work with me to reduce my medication as much as possible through more naturalistic approaches.
text: I am trying to find a doctor or medical doctor that works in neurology. I was in a car accident thirty-five years ago and have recently started having seizures from the head injury. I want to find someone who will work with me to reduce my medication as much as possible through more naturalistic approaches.
